# Deneb Templates
Deneb data visualization templates using Vega and Vega-Lite.

## Budget Calculation Simulator
Modified version of [Madison Giammaria's Bar Brushing visual.](https://github.com/Giammaria/Vega-Visuals#bar-brushing)

[View in Vega Editor](https://vega.github.io/editor/#-QACjAAEpNXpEKoJQB9WBJJBQcVa+OYJMps3ptwAXRAAF8ZKymOy4Ec2Gq6ehzjo4SsOrW9g26MDSyAOuJHMsYV3ueJTPjUHzQMOENDVklE0k4EhE--jDuiKTWSWl3Tgw4h0PdIUDtlGh5QVol4rxxR-jYpAGU5DUQJoF5QuGmzFDg4bDQA-Ho9MXkzeh1GjGPnSjex+gGQaY9C4gMDpOO5aA+NFUT6RwGwpABSAdUU8t039YlyUuKzH4tXouv+i1AqC+QQYxAWXO+tegaKMGdRizp7ky4T6A2PLxTMqr06O+VjEu8VLKlby12TRrU1a4Suy1Y5B43dViaR5UOvW0LdtW77JYXSBHlXasCzwLISVpSLaC+5LY7S4VruA2wVTirI6qSA5PHoKbtvBqzVRK5gX6HvCsbwuGPOKVGVvzOkhfFw9zvV4H2b4SCddii6ivAmW0plIhOzqisKqYHpolSyAC--HsH8fSGmyJADJdMijqS2GhKANRH0oAlDEHWEqPJWmrHjoNCOx1tYAJiOfO+igYhW2-HAewPwTCYBiA0oZrTQCjJPmacQEBngyTFA04pWiWmIRgihNCDxoUHBKX6DkbSKkrG0VcxuyAqggJogPKMfI7iZJkE0rR6LylNKqU4EwtT27Cy7A+VcsLLnmSHncSgT0tQzB2EgmAhKjwASUpM-mbSFkgD4Z0ZZwjVnCL6Ymb20dqG0K2XAHZMglH7NUbHQRbBnhQDoJSi5ZUKph1unc6eVwAHvCttygQ-yaDDK5NSgWNZaS8PpYytxdsGknPcF69l5rQ5bQTknW1rMnkXzcG8uoHyvni1+dCtFZSWFEu9TUvY9SimoqpemzFlSg4cvQHipABKYj9wAqS8ljS00YpnO0rNDKBZ+qaSy+Sj5NFmp0QdcM3LeXKipLIQVwqJSiuRlM5hmLgYqiEvhUoBNiJSplQIj6Kyy2Kv6iqjZNDsJsN2cog5Kt9UfUNWmE1zTS0smpcKsBPjMDGxiHki2Y8Zp6AAMx3FGuNdWVrE73Kjnah1AbTnBt7Vc-9EagPJ0ec8lerz3nyCTT8v5gyXWApLaGoRT6-FztVHhf4dB1CBJ-gtGInsPDyDedGyYLl416HDMFPiVIyjhlKbTGILZaSxjMSbdtb6x47T0I6x5kx7CScYzEejDwAIbMPSGnRRjFAmPfL4ixaVrHajsY4pSMgZh-i4Se4FrpZCyA5FkyoOSlO4o0zEAjC7iNqAkGRn+2oqNXDgLR7UZJfnvOUN29DMgYVusLU2rFdLs3oHqdlST6zUDDAAGxdlNbe8Lh5aXSp9W2tOWWekJcgywgVZFx0AQIKi8V07c7lMc4mTYERV1LI3fKrdjIlW7pkfuvYGij26o+kc0AF7jXZmvTh6DtzAM2pTvauoJkZCBrOWNnRE2EqwajdqBD4ppMoe+SmjDrq6kl3QBJyTCmFG2b2CptT-GYgNYQBAbTMQwBSDsfYeTXZDOqjdLk47IAzMWc7JSazGggV-b86mgtjb+4ttqbF7p8W7ojOOwAFimfWqHNLYe5bNv6uLvSkdFdESVmCZWowVanZM7OM6tlLHq1sC8UrNn0O1XslRA2z2gFC9hnRgrEX3AacNq9l22tIC-GsndsdZA1rJQKTQbA5R6AGFpy25G0IAJ-XNqdRCkgkOPjDViZB6cMxWMzhnXTGH688rTt4arpxJCgLw5roBN026N0y5QPCuw6vZ9LRDgjuc4r2Ib9i4Qpzij0AQPQlWKXLauSHji4e3CR7QpQJLTqDtYc4-kz1ytqmtrbu25GLdDJDaNcLon1zLUwem7+x9z75eK+Vw9NzC17Ws1m6JhpDImQAEEsgYtAPn2pPfFCYH72QSzrPZAT8H9l6L+Udiz6B59bhigABKAQaDpDj8HunifnTJCjyjwXvw3Cb7sDvkXbvQ+cWT1H3UGfxXTOt6t-qvW7c9cPYs2VLXGTI
